market_context: Tuesday tape constructive: 'Dow Settles Above 53,000: Investor Sentiment Improves, Fear & Greed Index Moves To Neutral Zone' (07-07) and 'Chip Rally Ignites Nasdaq 100 Rebound Ahead of SK Hynix's US Listing' (07-06). VOO 690.58, +1.1% over 30d; 'SCHD ETF Is Beating VOO and QQQ This Year' (07-05) still argues breadth over mega-cap tech. Data pull PARTIAL for the 4th consecutive run: fundamentals failed for all 7 tickers (proxy 403), prices+news intact - sector caps cannot be enforced, so any buy would be rejected sector-unknown and the parked JNJ buy stays parked; JNJ Q2 earnings now imminent (07-06 preview), adding event risk to re-entry anyway. Portfolio is 100% cash, so the holdings-only breaking-news web sweep was not applicable. Every ticker's headline list was non-empty today. No thesis-grade catalyst crossed the bar: all holds.

signals.thesis: China demand data undercuts the price-hike margin story: 'Apple Offered Big iPhone Discounts - Why Sales Still Fell in China' (07-07), even as 'Why Apple And Palantir Could Become Wall Street's New AI Favorites' (07-06) keeps sentiment warm. Price 312.73, +2.5% over 30d and at the top of the 30d range after a 5-session run from 281.69 - weak China plus a stretched short-term chart is not a buy setup. Falsified toward sell if China weakness shows up in Q3 guidance; toward buy if it doesn't.
sources: Benzinga 2026-07-07: Apple Offered Big iPhone Discounts - Why Sales Still Fell in China
Benzinga 2026-07-06: Why Apple And Palantir Could Become Wall Street's New AI Favorites

signals.thesis: Enterprise channel momentum is real but unquantified: two system-integrator deals in one day - 'Cognizant Expands Collaboration With Google Cloud Over Gemini Enterprise' (07-07) and 'Accenture, Google Cloud Announce Suite Of Agentic Tools' (07-07). Price 366.34, -5.5% over 30d, off the range low. No revenue attach or Cloud guidance yet, and no fundamentals this run. Falsified toward buy if Cloud backlog/guidance confirms the SI push; toward sell if Gemini Enterprise traction stalls.
sources: Benzinga 2026-07-07: Cognizant Expands Collaboration With Google Cloud Over Gemini Enterprise
Benzinga 2026-07-07: Accenture, Google Cloud Announce Suite Of Agentic Tools Over AI Transformation

signals.thesis: June buy thesis remains unfalsified - close 259.28, +11.9% over 30d, above the 240 falsification line - and 'Johnson & Johnson Likely To Report Higher Q2 Earnings; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call' (07-06) says the Q2 print is imminent. Re-entry stays parked: fundamentals missing for the 4th straight run means a buy is rejected sector-unknown, and initiating into earnings adds event risk. Revisit on a clean-data day after the Q2 report.
sources: Benzinga 2026-07-06: Johnson & Johnson Likely To Report Higher Q2 Earnings; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
trades.db decision log 2026-07-02: JNJ buy rejected sector-unknown under partial data

signals.thesis: Cost-cut story dominates the tape: 'Microsoft Lays Off 4,800 Employees: What Next for MSFT Stock' (07-06) plus political noise ('Bernie Sanders Says Microsoft's Layoffs and Xbox Price Hike Show Tax Cuts It Never Trickles Down', 07-07). Price 386.81, -7.7% over 30d, lower third of range. Layoffs are margin-supportive but say nothing about Azure demand; still waiting on Azure guidance or Copilot-merge confirmation. Falsified toward sell if layoffs precede a soft Azure print.
sources: Benzinga 2026-07-06: Microsoft Lays Off 4,800 Employees: What Next for MSFT Stock
Benzinga 2026-07-07: Bernie Sanders Says Microsoft's Layoffs and Xbox Price Hike Show Tax Cuts 'It Never Trickles Down'

signals.thesis: New competitive headline risk: 'Reuters Reported China's DeepSeek Is Developing AI Chip For Inference, Holding Talks With Foundries' (07-07) knocked the stock ('Nvidia Stock Drops on Reports That DeepSeek Is Quietly Developing Its Own AI Chip', 07-07); Nvidia counters 'Our Roadmap Remains Intact' after the Kyber server delay report (07-07). Price 195.59, -10.9% over 30d, just above the 191.97 floor flagged 07-06. Two-sided, unresolved, no position to protect. Re-evaluate if 191.97 breaks.
sources: Benzinga 2026-07-07: Reuters Reported China's DeepSeek Is Developing AI Chip For Inference, Holding Talks With Foundries, Memory And Chip-Design Firms, Hiring Chip-Design Engineers
Benzinga 2026-07-07: Nvidia Says 'Our Roadmap Remains Intact' After Kyber AI Server Delay Report, Jim Cramer Says 'Buy' While Others Urges Caution

signals.thesis: Managed-care momentum continues - 'UNH, Humana, CVS Soar, and Wall Street Analysts Take Note' (07-04); close 418.11, +9.3% over 30d but off the 07-02 high of 426.52. The rest of today's headline list is price-target and retrospective chatter (e.g. HSBC hold note), which this desk ignores per policy. No new fundamental catalyst (no guidance, regulatory, or management news) to act on. Falsified toward buy on a concrete cost-trend or guidance catalyst; toward sell if the 07-04 rally fully retraces.
sources: Benzinga 2026-07-04: UNH, Humana, CVS Soar, and Wall Street Analysts Take Note
